mapper.select: SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFirstDay */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM'),'YYYYMM'), 'YYYYMM') ||'01' AS FIRSTDAY FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getLastDay */ TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD') AS LASTDAY FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getToMonth */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM'),'YYYYMM'), 'YYYYMM') AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getToDay */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getToTime */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24'),'HH24'), 'HH24') AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getLastMonth */ TO_CHAR(TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) + 1) - TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'DD'), 'YYYYMM') AS LASTMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getLastMonth */ TO_CHAR(TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) + 1) - TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'DD'), 'YYYYMM') || '01' AS LASTMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getLastMonthMaxDay */ TO_CHAR(TRUNC(last_day(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE , -1))) + 0.99999421, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getWantDay */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + #{addition}, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYYMMDD') AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getToDayTime */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'),'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') || '0000' AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getWantDayTime */ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + #{addition}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24'),'YYYYMMDDHH24'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24') || '5959' AS TOMONTH FROM DUAL
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getCertainMonthMaxDay */ TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{wantDate},'YYYYMMDD')), 'YYYYMMDD') AS LASTDAY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT /* OrgCommonMapper.insertFile */ INTO ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST ( REGST_ID /* 등록자ID */ , REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ , ATT_DTTM /* 첨부일시 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , ATT_DSC /* 첨부설명 */ , ATT_ROUT /* 첨부경로 */ , ATT_SCTN /* 업무구분 */ , ORGN_ID /* SEQ */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ ) VALUES ( #{regstId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 등록자ID */ , sysdate /* 등록일시 */ , #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 첨부일시 */ , #{fileNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 파일명 */ , #{attDsc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 첨부설명 */ , #{attRout, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 첨부경로 */ , #{attSctn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 업무구분 */ , #{fileSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* SEQ */ , #{fileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 파일ID */ )
mapper.select: SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'ORG' ORDER BY REG_DTTM

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile2 */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'MRT' ORDER BY REG_DTTM

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile3 */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'CRD' ORDER BY REG_DTTM
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFileNm */ ATT_ROUT || '/' || FILE_NM AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY REG_DTTM
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFileNm2 */ ATT_ROUT || '/' || FILE_NM AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile4 */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'REC' ORDER BY REG_DTTM
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile5 */ COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile6 */ COUNT(*) FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'REC'

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFile7 */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ , ATT_DSC /* SEQ */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'REC' ORDER BY REG_DTTM
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getFileNm8 */ ATT_ROUT || ATT_DSC AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getRecSeq */ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_REQUEST_REC_01.NEXTVAL, '00000')) AS RECSEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getRequestKey */ ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ , FILE_ID /* 파일ID */ FROM ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ATT_SCTN = 'REC' ORDER BY REG_DTTM

SELECT /* OrgCommonMapper.getRequestKeyCnt */ COUNT(*) FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A, ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.ORGN_ID AND A.REQUEST_KEY = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.REC_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE /* OrgCommonMapper.getRequestKeyUpdate */ MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP SET REC_YN = 'N' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{orgnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
